hero_title: Hi, I'm Sem Van Broekhoven!
hero_subtitle: Software engineer with a passion for building cool stuff.
profile_description: I'm {age} years old and have found love in programming. I've been experimenting with technology from a young age. Currently I like to make projects with a variety of programming languages.
profile_tools_prog_description: I've made multiple projects with a variety of programming languages & frameworks. These are my favorite programming languages & frameworks that I've worked with.
profile_tools_tools_description: I've worked with these tools to successfully design, build & deploy multiple projects.
profile_experience_content_1: 2+ years builder, programmer and driver with VEX Robotics
profile_experience_content_5: 6 years member of STEAM-club, a national known science club at my secondary school
profile_achievements_content_0: 2 time National Champion in VEX Robotics
profile_achievements_content_1: Competed at the World Championship in VEX Robotics in America
profile_hs_content_0: High School diploma in Industrial IT
profile_uni_content_0: 2nd year of Applied Computer Science at Thomas More
projects_highlighted_description: Here are some of my favorite projects I've worked on.
projects_empty_description: The documentation for this project is still in the making. I'm probably distracted by a shiny new framework. Check back later!

cookie_banner_message: I use cookies to enhance your experience and remember your language preference.
cookie_page_description: I believe in a private web. This site uses no tracking or marketing cookies. The only cookies stored are technically necessary to provide you with a functional and localized experience.
cookie_list_inlang_desc: Remembers your preferred language (English or Dutch) so you don't have to switch it every time you visit.
cookie_list_theme_desc: Remembers your choice of Light or Dark mode to ensure the website renders correctly immediately upon loading.
cookie_list_analytics_desc: I use Umami for internal analytics. This does not use any cookies and does not track you across other websites. All data is anonymous.
privacy_page_description: Information about the privacy policy of this website.
about_me_who_am_i_content: I'm an {age} year old programmer who has found love in programming. I've been experimenting with technology from a young age. Currently I like to make projects with a variety of programming languages. Apart from programming, I like to play the guitar & listen to music. I'm a scuba diver & ex-competitive swimmer.
about_me_all_about_tech_content: I've been programming for 4+ years. I've been experimenting with a wide range of programming languages and am interested in multiple different fields. I'm currently using CachyOS (Linux) with Niri.
about_me_hobbies_content: I'm an amateur photographer who likes to take photographs of nature and urban scenes. I play guitar for 5+ years and love to play rock & metal songs.
di_description: Digital Innovation is a special part of the IT factory @ Thomas More in Geel. Instead of studying, we make projects for real clients to develop real skill. We need to research, develop, present, connect to develop our skills and complete our learning goals. We are free to use our own tech stacks and get the opportunity to work on projects that aren't taught in the normal courses.
di_description_2: I've learned a lot here. I work together with an amazing & talented team of students. We make projects in group or alone and deliver products used in the real world.
